fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Kansas Pharmacist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacist? Here's whether your license transfers to Kansas - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacist license reciprocity kansas, how to transfer pharmacist license to kansas, pharmacist compact kansas, kansas pharmacist endorsement application

board.name: Kansas Board of Pharmacy
board.parent_dept: Kansas Department for Aging and Disability Services (KDADS)
board.mailing_address:
Kansas Board of Pharmacy
800 SW Jackson, Suite 1414
Topeka, KS 66612-1231

license_types.title: RPh, PharmD
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacist in Kansas.

steps.title: Create Online Account
steps.description: Register for an account on the Kansas Board of Pharmacy Online Portal (MyLicense.com) using your email address and preferred password to begin the application process.

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Complete and submit the 'Application for Pharmacist Licensure by Endorsement' or 'Application for Pharmacist Licensure by Examination' online through the Kansas Board of Pharmacy Online Portal.

steps.title: Provide Documentation
steps.description: Arrange for official verification of your initial licensure by examination from the original state and any subsequent states where you've held a license. Submit authorization for a criminal background check (CBC).

steps.title: Pass MPJE
steps.description: Successfully complete the Kansas Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE) administered by NABP. Ensure your scores are sent to the Kansas Board of Pharmacy.

steps.title: Monitor Application Status
steps.description: Regularly check your application status through your Kansas Board of Pharmacy Online Portal account for updates and any requests for additional information or documents.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NAPLEX and MPJE.

provisional_text: Some states offer an intern or provisional license for graduates actively accumulating required hours or waiting to take the NAPLEX.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

faqs.question: How much does a Kansas pharmacist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies by state. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is the MPJE required in all states?
faqs.answer: Almost all states require passing their state-specific Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE) to verify knowledge of local pharmacy laws.

faqs.question: Does Kansas have reciprocity for pharmacists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacist practice in Kansas. To work in Kansas, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacist license to Kansas?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Kansas while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacist in Kansas
hero.dek: To apply for a Pharmacist license in Kansas, create an account and submit your application through the Kansas Board of Pharmacy Online Portal (MyLicense.com).

official_links.portal_name: Kansas Board of Pharmacy Online Portal (MyLicense.com)
official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the portal URL, click 'Register' or 'Create an Account', and follow the prompts to set up your profile with your email and chosen password.
